1. 16  109T Puck34: TCR integration

  • 17 Integrating spatial RNA and TCR data

    • 18.1 Calculate clonal expansion per clonotype
    • 18.2 Save merged object
    • 18.3 Get session info

16  109T Puck34: TCR integration

17 Integrating spatial RNA and TCR data

Commented out some plots to reduce the size of the HTML to under 100MB for Github upload

17.1 Libraries

library(SeuratObject)
Loading required package: sp

Attaching package: 'SeuratObject'
The following objects are masked from 'package:base':

    intersect, t
library(Seurat)
library(anndata)

Attaching package: 'anndata'
The following object is masked from 'package:SeuratObject':

    Layers
library(reticulate)
library(wesanderson)
library(dplyr)

Attaching package: 'dplyr'
The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':

    filter, lag
The following objects are masked from 'package:base':

    intersect, setdiff, setequal, union
library(stringr)
library(clustree)
Loading required package: ggraph
Loading required package: ggplot2

Attaching package: 'ggraph'
The following object is masked from 'package:sp':

    geometry
library(readxl)

Attaching package: 'readxl'
The following object is masked from 'package:anndata':

    read_excel
library(reshape2)
library(ggplotify)
library(cowplot)
library(comparator)
library(ggpointdensity)
library(ggvenn)
library(rmarkdown)
library(evaluate)
library(knitr)

source("../source_scripts/slideseq_functions_main.R")

options(Seurat.object.assay.version = 'v5')

17.2 Load virtual environment using reticulate

use_virtualenv("/home/cht269/my_envs/new_envs/R_anndata_py3.13.1/")

17.3 Load RNA puck

P109TB_34_RNA <- load_slideseq(gene_exp_dir = "/n/data2/dfci/medonc/cwu/chloe/slideseq_data/raw_data/RCC_pucks/2024-01-12_Puck_231024_34_109TB/gene_exp/", coords_dir = "/n/data2/dfci/medonc/cwu/chloe/slideseq_data/raw_data/RCC_pucks/2024-01-12_Puck_231024_34_109TB/Puck_231024_34_barcode_xy.txt.gz", project_name = "P109TB_34")

dim(P109TB_34_RNA)
[1] 28423 40221

17.4 Load TCR puck

P109TB_34_TCR <- anndata::read_h5ad("/n/data2/dfci/medonc/cwu/chloe/slideseq_data/tcr_analysis/RCC_neovax_pucks/nanoranger_anndata//adata_Puck_231024_34_TCR_109TB.h5ad")
P109TB_34_TCR
AnnData object with n_obs × n_vars = 1291 × 369
    obs: 'n_counts', 'n_genes_by_counts', 'total_counts', 'barcode', 'x', 'y'
    var: 'chains', 'cloneCount', 'cloneId', 'nSeqImputedCDR3', 'allVHitsWithScore', 'allDHitsWithScore', 'allJHitsWithScore', 'n_counts', 'n_cells_by_counts', 'mean_counts', 'pct_dropout_by_counts', 'total_counts'
    obsm: 'spatial'

17.5 Remove non-productive CDR3 sequences

all_cdr3 <- P109TB_34_TCR$var_names
all_cdr3 <- all_cdr3[!str_detect(all_cdr3, "_|\\*") & (str_detect(all_cdr3, "^C"))]
P109TB_34_TCR <- P109TB_34_TCR[,all_cdr3]

17.6 Extract helpful dataframes from TCR anndata object

TCR_seq <- P109TB_34_TCR$var
TCR_xy <- P109TB_34_TCR$obs %>%
  mutate(barcode = paste0(barcode, "-1"),
         x = round(x,1),
         y = round(y,1)) %>%
  dplyr::rename("TCR_x" = "x", 
                "TCR_y" = "y", 
                "TCR_barcode" = "barcode")

rownames(TCR_xy) <- TCR_xy$barcode

17.7 Double-check that the coordinate data matches

RNA_xy <- P109TB_34_RNA@images$image@coordinates %>%
  mutate(barcode = rownames(.)) %>%
  dplyr::rename("RNA_x" = "x", 
                "RNA_y" = "y", 
                "RNA_barcode" = "barcode")

rownames(RNA_xy) <- RNA_xy$barcode

RNA_xy %>%
  left_join(TCR_xy, by = c("RNA_barcode" = "TCR_barcode")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(TCR_x)) %>%
  mutate(x_match = case_when(RNA_x == TCR_x ~ TRUE,
                             RNA_x != TCR_x ~ FALSE),
         y_match = case_when(RNA_y == TCR_y ~ TRUE,
                             RNA_y != TCR_y ~ FALSE)) %>%
  count(x_match, y_match)
  x_match y_match   n
1    TRUE    TRUE 997

17.8 How many barcodes gathered from TCR exist in RNA

TCR_xy %>%
  mutate(IN_RNA = case_when((TCR_barcode %in% RNA_xy$RNA_barcode) ~ TRUE,
                            !(TCR_barcode %in% RNA_xy$RNA_barcode) ~ FALSE)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = 1, fill = IN_RNA)) + 
  geom_bar() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wes_palette("Darjeeling1")) +
  theme_classic() +
  ggtitle("No. of beads from TCR pipeline in RNA")

17.9 Assign all TCR barcodes to an RNA barcode

final_xy <- map_tcr_and_rna_barcodes(TCR_xy, RNA_xy)
[1] "Do matching barcodes share the same location? TRUE 997"
[1] "Number of rows: 1291"
[1] "Number of distinct TCR barcodes: 1291"
[1] "Number of distinct RNA barcodes: 1287"

17.10 Add the TCR data to the RNA as an additional assay

P109TB_34_RNA <- update_and_add_tcr_assay(P109TB_34_TCR, final_xy, P109TB_34_RNA)
[1] "Sanity: Number of same TCRs between xy coordinate DF and counts matrix: 1291"
[1] "Sanity: Total TCR counts from original TCR matrix: 87533"
[1] "Sanity: Total TCR counts from new TCR matrix: 87533"

17.11 Calculate Hamming distance between TCR barcodes and RNA barcodes

hamming_option = Hamming()
final_xy <- final_xy %>%
  mutate(hamming_dist = hamming_option(TCR_barcode, RNA_barcode))

17.12 Plot distribution of physical distance and Hamming distance of TCR-unique barcodes

final_xy %>%
  filter(TCR_barcode != RNA_barcode) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = distance, y = hamming_dist)) +
    geom_pointdensity() + 
  theme_classic() +
  xlab("physical distance") +
  ylab("hamming distance")

17.13 Plot number of beads w/ clonotype data

P109TB_34_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(TCR = case_when((nFeature_TCR > 0) ~ TRUE,
                         (nFeature_TCR == 0) ~ FALSE)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = 1, fill = TCR)) + 
  geom_bar() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wes_palette("Darjeeling1")) +
  theme_classic() +
  ggtitle("No. of beads w/ TCR")

17.14 Plot number of beads w/ multiple TCR chains

P109TB_34_RNA@meta.data %>%
  filter(nFeature_TCR > 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = 1, fill = as.factor(nFeature_TCR))) + 
  geom_bar() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wes_palette("Darjeeling2")) +
  theme_classic() +
  ggtitle("No. of beads w/ multiple TCR")

17.15 Open reactivity and scRNA-scTCR derived phenotypic data

reactivities <- read.csv("../objects/reformatted_RCC_slideseq_parameters_052925.csv") %>%
  filter(str_detect(sctcr_clone, "p109"))

17.16 Attach single cell derived clonotype descriptions to TCR metadata

TCR_seq <- TCR_seq %>%
  mutate(CDR3 = rownames(.)) %>%
  left_join(reactivities, by = c("chains", "CDR3"))

17.17 Create a summary of clonotypes per bead in object metadata

P109TB_34_RNA <- add_CDR3s_to_RNA_md(P109TB_34_RNA)
[1] "Sanity check: Summarized CDR3s properly? TRUE"
puck_specific_scTCR_clones <- get_puck_specific_sctcr_clones(TCR_seq, reactivities)
Warning in left_join(., puck_specific_sc_clones, by = c("chains", "CDR3")): Detected an unexpected many-to-many relationship between `x` and `y`.
ℹ Row 3 of `x` matches multiple rows in `y`.
ℹ Row 24 of `y` matches multiple rows in `x`.
ℹ If a many-to-many relationship is expected, set `relationship =
  "many-to-many"` to silence this warning.
[1] "Print the single cell clones with the same CDR3- the most highly expanded scTCR clone for each CDR3 will be kept"

P109TB_34_RNA <- attach_phenotype_specificity_to_RNA_md(puck_specific_scTCR_clones, P109TB_34_RNA)
[1] "Were all RNA barcodes with a TCR assigned phenotype/specificity metadata? TRUE"
P109TB_34_RNA <- create_final_clone_ids(P109TB_34_RNA, reactivities)

17.18 Create a summary of clonotypes per bead in object metadata

P109TB_34_RNA$log_nFeature_TCR <- log(P109TB_34_RNA$nFeature_TCR)
P109TB_34_RNA$log_nCount_TCR <- log(P109TB_34_RNA$nCount_TCR)
P109TB_34_RNA$log_nFeature_Spatial <- log(P109TB_34_RNA$nFeature_Spatial)
P109TB_34_RNA$log_nCount_Spatial <- log(P109TB_34_RNA$nCount_Spatial)

18 Plot TCR distribution spatially

SpatialFeaturePlot(P109TB_34_RNA, features = c("log_nFeature_TCR", "log_nCount_TCR"), pt.size = 3, alpha = c(0.5,1))
SpatialFeaturePlot(P109TB_34_RNA, features = c("log_nFeature_Spatial", "log_nCount_Spatial"), pt.size = 3, alpha = c(0.5,1))

18.1 Calculate clonal expansion per clonotype

# Count up clones
puck34_109TB_clone_id_count <- P109TB_34_RNA@meta.data %>%
  filter(!is.na(clone_id)) %>%
  pull(clone_id) %>%
  paste0(collapse = ",") %>%
  str_split_1(fixed(",")) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::rename("clone_id" = ".") %>%
  count(clone_id) %>%
  dplyr::rename("puck34_count" = "n")

clone_counts.df <- data.frame()
  # Remove non-TCR containing beads
  puck_T <- P109TB_34_RNA@meta.data %>%
    filter(nFeature_TCR > 0)
  # Beads can have multiple TCRs- assign the largest count
  for(i in c(1:nrow(puck_T))){
    # Get the clones/CDR3 associated with each barcode
    associated_clones <- puck_T[i,"clone_id"] %>%
      str_split_1(",")
    # Find these clones in the total counts df and pick whichever clone is the largest
    associated_counts <- puck34_109TB_clone_id_count %>%
      filter(clone_id %in% associated_clones) %>%
      filter(puck34_count == max(puck34_count)) %>%
      slice_head(n = 1) %>%
      dplyr::rename("largest_clone_id" = "clone_id") %>%
      select(largest_clone_id, puck34_count) %>%
      mutate(log_puck34_count = log10(puck34_count))
    # Push this barcode, it's associated clone and counts to a dataframe
    new_row <- cbind(associated_counts, barcode = puck_T[i,"barcode"])
    clone_counts.df <- rbind(clone_counts.df, new_row)
  }
  
  # Update metadata of the puck
  P109TB_34_RNA@meta.data <- P109TB_34_RNA@meta.data %>%
    full_join(clone_counts.df, by = "barcode") %>%
    mutate(puck34_count = case_when(is.na(puck34_count) ~ 0,
                                    !is.na(puck34_count) ~ puck34_count),
           log_puck34_count = case_when(is.na(log_puck34_count) ~ 0,
                                      !is.na(log_puck34_count) ~ log_puck34_count))
  
  rownames(P109TB_34_RNA@meta.data) <- P109TB_34_RNA@meta.data$barcode
  
P109TB_34_RNA %>% 
  subset(nFeature_TCR > 0) %>%
SpatialFeaturePlot(features = "log_puck34_count", pt.size = 3, stroke = 0.1, alpha = 0.5) + scale_fill_viridis()
Warning: Not validating Seurat objects
Scale for fill is already present.
Adding another scale for fill, which will replace the existing scale.

18.2 Save merged object

saveRDS(P109TB_34_RNA, "01_Puck34_109TB_TCR_RNA_merged_110724.Rds")
